name: io.github.trustscoreagent/mcp-server
description: Check the reputation of AI microservices and public APIs from an open trust registry.

environmentVariables.name: TRUSTSCORE_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the TrustScore registry. Defaults to the public production API; override only for a self-hosted or staging instance.

environmentVariables.name: TRUSTSCORE_AGENT_DID
environmentVariables.description: Optional stable agent DID used when submitting ratings. If omitted, a local anonymous DID is generated and persisted on first use.
